scripts.dev:frontend: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace frontend run dev
scripts.dev:backend: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace backend run dev
scripts.api:smoke: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace backend run api:smoke
scripts.verify: npm run shared:smoke && npm run content:validate && npm run api:smoke && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
